name: EXTRINSIC ALLERGIC ALVEOLITIS
definition: HYPERSENSITIVITY PNEUMONITIS characterized by an inappropriate host response to repeatedly inhaled organic allergens often bacteria < 1 µm in diameter with morphologic characteristics of fungi; found in soil, renewed exposure to antigen with improvement between attacks usually within enclosed less intense but continuous exposure to inhaled antigens, usually in domestic environment prolonged insidious dust exposure

demographics.Histo: 1. Cellular bronchiolitis = chronic inflammatory cells lining small airways

dominant_finding: fibrosis of middle + lower lung zones with relative sparing of lung bases:
